# Brushwork Painting Co.

> Interior and exterior painting specialists in Oakville, Ontario. Free colour consultation, specialty finishes, and a 5-year warranty on every project.

## Services
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting
- Colour Consultation (free with every project)
- Specialty Finishes (limewash, faux plaster, Venetian plaster, wallpaper)
- Cabinet Refinishing

## Service Area
Oakville, Burlington, Milton, Mississauga, and surrounding Halton Region, Ontario, Canada.

## Contact
- Phone: (905) 555-0283
- Email: hello@brushworkpainting.ca
- Website: https://brushworkpainting.ca
